message:
feat: Extend FCP SDK with improved exports and test coverage

Enhance SDK functionality:

- Expand lib.rs with additional exports
- Extend prelude for convenient imports
- Add rate limit declarations test
- Update golden vector tests
- Improve schema tests
- Enhance state tests
- Update streaming tests
- Improve trait tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -110,7 +110,13 @@ pub use fcp_core::{
     // Provenance
     Provenance,
     ProvenanceStep,
+    RateLimitConfig,
+    RateLimitDeclarations,
+    RateLimitEnforcement,
+    RateLimitPool,
+    RateLimitScope,
     RateLimitStatus,
+    RateLimitUnit,
     ReadinessResponse,
     ReplayBufferInfo,
     RequestId,
